titleStmt.title: SII 38.157: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 157. (A.R. No. 157 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, verandah, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It records that a certain that a certain Malaiyyuḍaiyāṉ Toṇḍaimāṉ, a native of Āmmapakkam in Tirumunaippāḍi in Naḍuvil-nāḍu gifted 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiūr. The shepherd of the locality, Tribhuvanasundara-chēri, Śiṅgan Kaṇṇaṉ agreed to supply oil for the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟai vitiyil neṟiyaṉaittum taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭi
tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭai ticaikkaḷiṟeṭṭu taṅku tanik kūṭantānena viḷaṅka karuṅkali paṭṭicai ceṅkol turappa poruvaliyāḻi puvi vaḷattuṭaṉ vara villavar ciṅkaḷar minavar teliṅkar palla
var nutaliyar pāṟtivarp paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka maṇṇakam puṇarntu viraciṅkācanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tirubhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarā
jadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu naṭuvi nāṭṭu tirumunaippāṭi nāṭṭu malaiyyuṭaiyāṉ Āmmapakkat toṇṭaimān Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiūruṭaiyāṟku vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakkoṉṟukkum
viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2- m tripuvanacun=taracceri manṟāṭi ciṅkankaṇṇaneṉ Iviḷakku Ācantirakālam celutta kaṭaveṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
